sourcesContent:
const products = [
  {
    id: '1',
    name: 'Smartphone Pro Max',
    category: 'Electronics',
    price: 899,
    rating: 4.7,
    image: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/1092671/pexels-photo-1092671.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=750&w=1260',
    description: 'Powerful smartphone with premium camera, long battery life, and immersive display.',
  },
  {
    id: '2',
    name: 'Wireless Headphones',
    category: 'Audio',
    price: 129,
    rating: 4.5,
    image: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/3394660/pexels-photo-3394660.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=750&w=1260',
    description: 'Comfortable over-ear headphones with noise cancellation and crisp sound.',
  },
  {
    id: '3',
    name: 'Running Sneakers',
    category: 'Sportswear',
    price: 79,
    rating: 4.3,
    image: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/2529148/pexels-photo-2529148.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=750&w=1260',
    description: 'Lightweight running sneakers engineered for speed, stability, and everyday training.',
  },
  {
    id: '4',
    name: 'Smart Watch',
    category: 'Wearables',
    price: 199,
    rating: 4.6,
    image: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/267394/pexels-photo-267394.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=750&w=1260',
    description: 'Connected smartwatch with fitness tracking, notifications, and modern styling.',
  },
  {
    id: '5',
    name: 'Designer Backpack',
    category: 'Accessories',
    price: 59,
    rating: 4.2,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1581605405669-fcdf81165afa',
    description: 'Premium designer backpack with organized pockets for travel and daily use.',
  },
  {
    id: '6',
    name: 'Bluetooth Speaker',
    category: 'Audio',
    price: 49,
    rating: 4.4,
    image: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/3394657/pexels-photo-3394657.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=750&w=1260',
    description: 'Portable Bluetooth speaker with deep bass, crisp audio, and up to 12 hours of playtime.',
  },
  {
    id: '7',
    name: 'Desk Lamp',
    category: 'Home',
    price: 39,
    rating: 4.1,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1505693416388-ac5ce068fe85',
    description: 'Adjustable LED desk lamp with warm light and a sleek, space-saving design.',
  },
  {
    id: '8',
    name: 'Gaming Keyboard',
    category: 'Electronics',
    price: 99,
    rating: 4.8,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1511467687858-23d96c32e4ae',
    description: 'Mechanical gaming keyboard with RGB lighting and responsive switches for fast gameplay.',
  },
  {
    id: '9',
    name: "Men's T-Shirt",
    category: 'Apparel',
    price: 25,
    rating: 4.2,
    image: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/428340/pexels-photo-428340.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=750&w=1260',
    description: 'Soft cotton men’s t-shirt with a regular fit and breathable comfort.',
  },
  {
    id: '10',
    name: "Women's Hoodie",
    category: 'Apparel',
    price: 45,
    rating: 4.5,
    image: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/428338/pexels-photo-428338.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=750&w=1260',
    description: 'Cozy women’s hoodie with brushed fleece lining and relaxed fit.',
  },
  {
    id: '11',
    name: 'Denim Jeans',
    category: 'Apparel',
    price: 59,
    rating: 4.3,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542272604-787c3835535d',
    description: 'Classic denim jeans with stretch for comfort and everyday wear.',
  },
  {
    id: '12',
    name: 'Casual Jacket',
    category: 'Apparel',
    price: 85,
    rating: 4.4,
    image: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/4283408/pexels-photo-4283408.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=750&w=1260',
    description: 'Versatile casual jacket with lightweight insulation and modern styling.',
  },
];

export default products;
